overview.title: AI Platform Solutions
overview.description: Production-grade, embeddable AI platform components: AI Engine, Multi Modal Chat, Collaborative Editing, and Search & RAG.

aiEngine.title: AI Engine — Agent Runtime & Orchestration
aiEngine.description: A complete AI orchestration layer: multi-provider LLM support, tool calling, MCP protocol, voice I/O, and streaming for your product.

chat.title: Multi Modal Chat
chat.description: A unified communication layer where humans and AI agents collaborate naturally with rich media, voice messages, and interactive workflows.

collabEditing.title: Collaborative Document Editing
collabEditing.description: Multi-user real-time editing with AI assistance, CRDT sync, live cursors, and version history — embeddable into any product.

searchRag.title: Search & RAG
searchRag.description: Semantic search and intelligent retrieval that makes your entire knowledge base AI-accessible with hybrid vector and keyword search.

hero.lede: Production-grade building blocks where intelligence, communication, and knowledge work together inside your product.

pillars.heading: Powerful on their own. Transformative together.
pillars.aiEngineBody: A full agent runtime that connects LLMs to your product's domain. Define agents, give them tools, let them reason and act.
pillars.chatBody: A unified communication layer where humans and AI agents collaborate naturally. Rich media, interactive workflows, intelligent notifications.
pillars.collabBody: Multiple people and AI agents edit the same document simultaneously with automatic conflict resolution. The tech behind Google Docs, embeddable anywhere.
pillars.ragBody: Indexes content automatically, combines vector similarity with full-text search, and provides a retrieval API agents use to ground responses in real data.

industries.heading: Adapts to your domain.
industries.softwareBody: Code-review agents, team channels, codebase search.
industries.healthcareBody: Clinical decision support, provider messaging, medical knowledge retrieval.
industries.financeBody: Risk analysis, compliance chat, regulatory document search.
industries.legalBody: Contract analysis, case collaboration, precedent search.
industries.educationBody: Adaptive tutoring, student messaging, curriculum search.
industries.supportBody: Ticket resolution agents, multi-channel support, knowledge base retrieval.
industries.manufacturingBody: Quality analysis, field coordination, technical manual search.
industries.realestateBody: Market analysis, agent-client communication, property search.

cta.body: These components are powerful individually, transformative together. Let's discuss how they fit your product.

detail.seeInAction: Want to see this in action?
detail.seeInActionBody: Schedule a demo to see how these components embed into your product.

aiEngine.heroSubtitle: From chat assistants to autonomous agents -- a complete AI orchestration layer

chat.heroSubtitle: A complete messaging backbone where humans and AI agents communicate as equals

collabEditing.heroSubtitle: Multi-user real-time editing with AI assistance -- like Google Docs, built for your product

searchRag.heroSubtitle: Semantic search and intelligent retrieval that makes your entire knowledge base AI-accessible
